events.title: Billy Strings - Live Streaming from Boston
events.description: The hottest guitar picker in all the land is hitting his stride again after healing from his gruesome injury. In the historic city of Boston, Billy and his band will go one if by land and two if by sea. The instrumental acrobatics are obviously the star, but Billy’s stage production has evolved to a very high level to captivate the crowds at these large venues. Watching it all go down on our big HD projection screen is the next best thing to be there. Enjoy the chill environment here while eatin
events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States

events.title: Ginger Molasses w/ Tori Roze and the Hot Mess Hot Summer Nights After Party

events.title: Billy Strings and Phish Streams

events.title: Moody Cat

If you understand the ambition and vision of bandleader David Lee, then it comes as no surprise. Constantly processing all the most elite influences from an array of musical genres, he’s shaped himself into a renaissance man of eclecticism. events.title: Phish - Live Streaming from MSG
events.description: We find ourselves tuning into the Phish Summer Tour pretty late in the game as they hit night four of five at the world’s most iconic arena – Madison Square Garden. We expect by this point they will be bending the entire fabric of existence and conjuring matter out of thin air. Watching a live stream at the CH on our big HD projection screen with crisp club sound is undoubtedly the next best thing to being there, and even better in certain ways. Get comfortable, dance if you want, chill at a tab
events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States

events.title: Boco Do Rio Hot Summer Nights After Party
events.description: Closing out our Hot Summer Nights After Party Series, Boca Do Rio is ready to transport us into an exotic sonic jungle of infinite possibility. events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States

events.title: Saints of Circumstance
events.description: GET YOUR TICKETS When August 1st rolls around, we are ready to celebrate one of the most inspiring musicians who ever lived – Jerry Garcia. They have been one of the most beloved Grateful Dead and Jerry Garcia tribute bands in the Sierra Foothills for many years running. events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States

events.title: Trivia Night
events.description: Nevada City’s longest running Trivia Night happens on *most* Wednesdays at the Crazy Horse. Great minds unite to Eat! Drink! Think! Bring your most clever friends, establish a team of up to five people and catalyze the collective power of your brilliant intellect. Your charismatic host BK will present questions covering a wide range of subjects in eight different categories. You’ll tap into knowledge you didn’t even realize you had. events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States

events.title: The Geezer Gig
events.description: Over fifteen years running and still going strong, this “Second Friday Tradition” is as reliable as the tides. You definitely don’t have to be a geezer to appreciate this community pow wow. Bob Woods is the most eminently tasteful guitarist in the foothills. The lifelong railroad man is too good to be this humble, while firmly planted behind the wheel of the locomotive. Doubling as a member of ZZ Top, drummer Skip Alan Smith relishes his role in powering the steam engine of the groove. Retro-coo
events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States
